title: Kaypro II launched May 20, 1982
content:
On May 20, 1982, Kaypro shipped its very successful Kaypro II computer, a portable computer that ran CP/M and its associated software. Its main innovation was bundling a selection of popular software with the computer and selling the bundle for

The post Kaypro II launched May 20, 1982 appeared first on The Silicon Underground.
